channel.title: MangaPlus - Nuevos Estrenos
channel.description: RSS filtrado solo para nuevos estrenos (capítulos #001-#004 o One-shot)

item.title: A Questionnaire on the Mouth - #003
item.description: [#003] Read the Manga A Questionnaire on the Mouth by Sesuji / Shuzo Oshimi for free!

item.title: NEWBaby Road Trippers - #001

item.description: [#001] Read the Manga Soon, You'll Paint Your Heart Out by Neguse Okita for free!

item.title: highway - One-shot

item.title: A Scary Story That Happened to Nakamura (Name Changed) - One-shot
